summary: tests/integration/test_billing.py::test_invoice_amount_after_tax fails mid-log: Invoice.total returns 107.5 instead of 108.0 for subtotal=100.00, tax_rate=0.08 (rounding or precision mismatch). 12 other tests passed. Post-failure cleanup, cache-save, artifact-upload, and environment-check steps all completed successfully — the tail of the log looks green, but exit_code=1 confirms the test failure.
